# Requirements Checklist

Use this checklist to validate that requirements are complete, clear, and ready for development. The **Business Analyst** owns this checklist and should complete it in partnership with the **Product Manager** and **QA Lead** before work enters the sprint backlog.

---

## Business Need & Scope

- [ ] Business problem or opportunity is clearly stated
- [ ] Goals and success metrics are defined (SMART where possible)
- [ ] Scope boundaries are documented (in-scope and out-of-scope)
- [ ] Dependencies on other teams, systems, or data sources are identified
- [ ] Regulatory, compliance, or security requirements are noted

## Stakeholder Alignment

- [ ] Key stakeholders have been identified and engaged
- [ ] Stakeholder feedback has been incorporated or documented as deferred
- [ ] Sign-off obtained from Product Manager on requirements priority
- [ ] Stakeholder approval obtained for major scope decisions (if required)

## User Stories & Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] All requirements are expressed as user stories or clearly scoped tasks
- [ ] Each user story follows the format: "As a [persona], I want [action], so that [outcome]"
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are documented for each story
- [ ] Acceptance criteria are testable (can be verified by QA)
- [ ] Edge cases and error scenarios are captured
- [ ] Non-functional requirements (performance, accessibility, security) are included

## Traceability

- [ ] Each requirement is linked to a business objective or stakeholder need
- [ ] Requirements are tracked in the backlog or requirements traceability matrix
- [ ] Any changes to requirements after sign-off are logged and communicated

## Handoff Readiness

- [ ] QA Lead has reviewed acceptance criteria and confirmed they are testable
- [ ] Development team has reviewed stories and flagged technical concerns
- [ ] Estimates have been completed (or flagged as needing refinement)
- [ ] Stories meet the team's Definition of Ready
- [ ] Related design or architecture artifacts are linked

---

**Owner:** Business Analyst  
**Reviewers:** Product Manager, QA Lead, Project Manager  
**Reference:** [Roles & Personas](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md) | [Project Planning](../octoacme-project-planning.md)
